name: Mama's Easy Sourdough Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Cover the mixture tightly and place it in the refrigerator.
3. When ready to use, take out the dough and knead with a little extra flour until it is smooth and elastic.
4. Shape the dough into biscuits and bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
